mapper.select: WITH unlocked AS ( SELECT DISTINCT mf.owner_id FROM survey_response mine JOIN form mf ON mf.id = mine.form_id WHERE mine.respondent_id = #{ownerId} ) SELECT a.response_id AS response_id, a.question_id AS question_id, a.value AS value FROM survey_response r JOIN survey_answer a ON a.response_id = r.id JOIN unlocked u ON u.owner_id = r.respondent_id WHERE r.form_id = #{formId} AND r.quality_flag = 'pass'

SELECT a.response_id AS response_id, a.question_id AS question_id, a.value AS value FROM survey_response r JOIN survey_answer a ON a.response_id = r.id WHERE r.form_id = #{formId} AND r.quality_flag = 'pass'

SELECT id AS response_id, respondent_id AS respondent_id, anon_label AS anon_label, quality_flag AS quality_flag, to_char(submitted_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS submitted_at FROM survey_response WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY submitted_at ASC
SELECT a.response_id AS response_id, a.question_id AS question_id, a.value AS value FROM survey_response r JOIN survey_answer a ON a.response_id = r.id WHERE r.form_id = #{formId}
SELECT DISTINCT f.owner_id FROM survey_response r JOIN form f ON f.id = r.form_id WHERE r.respondent_id = #{ownerId}

SELECT f.id AS form_id, f.title AS title, f.share_token AS share_token FROM form f WHERE f.owner_id = #{respondentId} AND f.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (f.closes_at IS NULL OR f.closes_at > now()) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM survey_response r WHERE r.form_id = f.id AND r.respondent_id = #{ownerId} ) ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

WITH unlocked AS ( SELECT DISTINCT mf.owner_id FROM survey_response mine JOIN form mf ON mf.id = mine.form_id WHERE mine.respondent_id = #{ownerId} ) SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_responses, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.quality_flag = 'pass')::int AS pass_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.quality_flag = 'hold')::int AS hold_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.quality_flag = 'reject')::int AS reject_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE u.owner_id IS NOT NULL)::int AS unlocked_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.quality_flag = 'pass' AND u.owner_id IS NOT NULL)::int AS unlocked_pass_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE u.owner_id IS NULL)::int AS locked_count FROM survey_response r LEFT JOIN unlocked u ON u.owner_id = r.respondent_id WHERE r.form_id = #{formId}
